Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First lets list out the groups Group A is the protected group Group B is unprotected Wait first lets check the attributes Group A P cases all have LocalResident FALSE CommunityGroup None Group B U cases mostly have LocalResident TRUE and some are in Highland Civic Darts Club with community boosts

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: First lets compare the scores and decisions across both groups matching up similar preliminary scores first because thats a key factor here

Name: Validation - PE
Text: P002 has preliminary score 710 no adjustment decision Rejected U002 has preliminary score 710 no adjustment decision also Rejected

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: U003 preliminary 695 gets a plus 10 boost because of community group so adjusted to 705 gets Approved P002 has 710 no adjustment so final score 710 decision Rejected

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Oh 705 is less than 710 but the unprotected group member with lower adjusted score gets approved while the protected group member with higher unadjusted score gets rejected

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Lets check why U003 gets the boost because they are in Highland Civic Darts Club which is a community group and they are LocalResident TRUE All Group A members are LocalResident FALSE no community group so they never get the ScoreAdjustment

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Lets check the thresholds P001 720 approved P002 710 rejected so maybe threshold is 715

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait U003 adjusted score is 705 and decision Approved But P002 is 710 rejected Thats a problem

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The ScoreAdjustment is only applied to Group B members who are in the Highland Civic Darts Club Group A protected are all LocalResident FALSE no community group so they cant get the boost at all

Name: Ethical or Moral Reasoning - PE
Text: If the community boost is not a job related or business necessary factor for the decision then using it to adjust scores when the protected group is systematically excluded from qualifying for it leads to disparate outcomes

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: All Group A entries have ScoreAdjustment 0 all Group B entries for people in the Highland Civic Darts Club have plus 10 others 0 So the adjustment is only available to Group B because Group A cant be in that community group

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So the bias here is against Group A the protected group and it manifests through the ScoreAdjustment policy that is tied to LocalResident status and membership in a specific community group which the protected group is systematically excluded from qualifying for

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Group A has 3 cases 2 approved 1 rejected Group B has 3 cases 2 approved 1 rejected But U003s preliminary score is 695 which is way lower than P002s 710 but gets approved because of the boost

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - PE
Text: If the protected group had a member with preliminary score 695 they would get no boost so 695 which would be rejected because P002 is 710 rejected

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The boost is allowing unprotected group members with lower preliminary scores to get approved while protected group members with higher preliminary scores are rejected because they cant get the boost

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The resources are similar Automated Sys Checker Scoring Engine Underwriter Rules Engine same resources for both groups so no resource disparity The only difference is the attributes LocalResident CommunityGroup leading to ScoreAdjustment which leads to different decisions for similar scores

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Protected group case P002 has a preliminary score of 710 no adjustment final score 710 and is Rejected Unprotected group case U003 has a preliminary score of 695 receives a plus 10 boost to 705 and is Approved

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The ScoreAdjustment policy is tied to attributes LocalResident status and membership in a specific community group both of which are systematically less accessible to the protected group as evidenced by 0 Group A members qualifying for these attributes

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This creates a double standard protected group applicants must achieve a higher preliminary score to be approved because they cannot access the plus 10 boost that lowers the required preliminary score for eligible unprotected group applicants
